creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 175477
ssp-0.9 update

There is new version of net/self-service-password. Project code migrated to github, that's why this update is so late.

I've made a patch. I've tested it with poudriere - see http://uld.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/10x64-testing/2016-10-06_23h33m16s/logs/self-service-password-0.9.log

I've checked this patch with portlint also. Results are:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Consider to set DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

Patch is attached.

Thank you for commiting this patch
